info.DAtuviSezaH: kfpo ro laH 8.2.18 iti sUtreRa asmin DAtO vidyamAnasya fkArasya nityaM xkArAdeSaH taTA ca rePasya lakArAdeSaH Bavati
info.english_meaning: to mix to think to imagine to paint
info.hindI_arTa: kalpanA karanA vicAra karanA miSrita karanA citrita karanA raMganA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' kalpate Sapi sAmarTye kalpayatyavakalkane  adantasya kfperRO tu dOrbalye kfpayediti ' (Slo. 135) - devaH

conjugations.bahu: akalpayiQvam, akalpayiDvam, akalpiDvam, akxpayiQvam, akxpayiDvam, akxpiDvam

participles.neuter: kalpayAmbaBUvat, kalpayAmbaBUvad, kalpayAmAsivat, kalpayAmAsivad, kalpayAYcakfvat, kalpayAYcakfvad
